title: behen antelopum
intro: Behen antelopum, also known as Indian walnut or Behen tree, is a deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, characterized by its large, edible nuts. The medicinal properties of Behen antelopum include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Behen antelopum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of diabetes. Behen antelopum can be prepared into herbal preparations such as oil, powder, or capsules, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
